noDurableFieldsReason: FU01C adds no durable BattleState fields; accepted evidence reuses production BattleSubjectKind generic route subject variants, existing BattleEntrypointTrace route events, and adapter qRoute projection. Blocked rows remain target blockers instead of duplicating marked-transfer or condition-immunity state.
